modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log in due to username or password issue.

full_description_text: User cannot log in. Windows is not accepting the username. Password is also not working. This is happening on Windows 7.
short_description: Unable to log in due to username or password issue.
description: User cannot log in. Windows is not accepting the username. Password is also not working. This is happening on Windows 7.
